one_time_description: Large increase in deferred revenue of $8,728,033 suggesting receipt of significant government funding for future periods; also prior year adjustment of $223,437
economic_notes: First Nation holds investments in Daxet Development Corporation, Slikel Enviromental Corporation, Thuna Meh Mun-Ah Holdings Inc., Xa'xe Temexw Holdings Ltd. (bare trustee), Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20%), Qemqomet Development Limited Partnership (CEK SNANET CENTER, 99.99%), Neka Sol Woodlot Limited Partnership (99.99%), and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Auditors issued qualified opinion due to unavailability of audited financials for Qemqomet Development LP and Daxet Development Corporation.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to unavailability of audited financial statements for Qemqomet Development LP (CEK SNANET CENTER) and Daxet Development Corporation. Prior year adjustment of $223,437 recorded (Note 19). Deferred revenue increased dramatically from $6,868 to $8,734,901, suggesting large advance funding received. Consolidated entities include T'Sou-ke First Nation Government Administration, Trusts Fund, and CMHC Social Housing Program. Six GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method. Capital projects expenses of $107,752 not allocated to specific categories above.
